datasets.title: Cross-Space Dependency
datasets.description: Native C++ evidence for paired event-log strings under edit distance and process curves under TWED; dependence is computed with MGC over two finite metric spaces.

diagnostics.algorithm: mtrc::compare(..., mgc_options) plus native seeded permutation_test

diagnostics.note: Schema-valid native evidence export only; CMake, automated tests, and hero/gallery integration remain separate work.
